name: @stackline/multiselect
description: Vanilla JavaScript multiselect dropdown with Stackline skins.

scripts.build:direct: mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/stackline-multiselect-*.zip && cp src/stackline-multiselect.js dist/stackline-multiselect.js && cp src/stackline-multiselect.css dist/stackline-multiselect.css && (cd dist && zip -q -j stackline-multiselect-1.0.0.zip stackline-multiselect.js stackline-multiselect.css README.md direct-example.html)
